question: how many customers have not paid their invoices? Can you create a table of number of invoices not paid and number customers in that category?
error: aggregate functions are not allowed in the GROUP BY clause
wrong_sql:
SELECT 
  COUNT(i.invoice_id) AS num_unpaid_invoices,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_id) AS num_customers
FROM customers c
JOIN invoices i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id
WHERE i.status != 'paid'
GROUP BY COUNT(i.invoice_id)
ORDER BY num_unpaid_invoices
corrected_sql:
SELECT 
  num_unpaid_invoices,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS num_customers
FROM (
  SELECT 
    c.customer_id,
    COUNT(i.invoice_id) AS num_unpaid_invoices
  FROM customers c
  JOIN invoices i ON c.customer_id = i.customer_id
  WHERE i.status != 'paid'
  GROUP BY c.customer_id
) AS unpaid_invoices
GROUP BY num_unpaid_invoices
ORDER BY num_unpaid_invoices
lesson: Original query used invalid syntax. Error: aggregate functions are not allowed in the GROUP BY clause. Fixed by rewriting the query.
